use_cases: Landing page hero sections that need animated visual depth
Product feature showcases with dynamic background motion
Dashboard interfaces with ambient scrolling grid effects
Portfolio or creative agency sites seeking modern aesthetics
Interactive documentation pages with visual engagement
ai_summary: An infinite scrolling grid background component that uses Framer Motion for smooth animation and mouse tracking. The grid reveals an active layer on hover while continuously scrolling, creating an immersive depth effect. Ideal for SaaS landing pages, dashboards, and modern web interfaces that benefit from subtle animated backgrounds without distracting from content.
